title: Cobblemon Intros
description: Allows Cobblemon battle music to have a non-looping intro.
body:
Client-side mod that allows Cobblemon battle music to have an intro that isn't looped.

If your music file is at `sounds/battle/wild.ogg`, put the intro at `sounds/battle/wild_intro.ogg`. (The intro does not need to be listed separately in `sounds.json`.)
